# Junk Bros 509 — llms.txt
# AI-readable site summary for LLM crawlers and assistants
# https://www.junkbros509.com

## Business

**Name:** Junk Bros 509
**Type:** Local junk removal company — locally owned and family operated
**Founded:** 2018
**Founders:** Jacob Castillo and Jeremy Castillo
**Location:** Zillah, WA (serves all of Yakima Valley, WA)
**Phone:** (509) 314-8132
**Email:** junkbros509@gmail.com
**Hours:** Mon–Sat 7:30am–7:30pm, Sun 9:00am–5:00pm
**Rating:** 5 stars · 200+ reviews (Google, Nextdoor)

## What We Do

Junk Bros 509 is Yakima's top-rated full-service junk removal company. We haul away anything you need removed — appliances, furniture, hot tubs, construction debris, yard waste, mattresses, and more. We are fully licensed and insured. We arrive in uniform, provide an upfront price before starting, and handle all hauling and disposal including responsible recycling and donation.

## Services

- Household Junk Removal (furniture, clutter, misc.)
- Appliance Removal (refrigerators, washers, dryers, etc.)
- Hot Tub Removal — starting at $375
- Pool Table Removal — starting at $275
- Piano Removal — starting at $275
- Estate Cleanout
- Garage Cleanout
- Construction Debris Removal
- Foreclosure / Eviction Cleanout
- Yard Waste Removal
- Mattress Disposal
- Hoarder House Cleanout
- Office Furniture Removal
- Trampoline Removal

## Pricing

All prices include labor, dump fees, and tax. No hidden charges. Free upfront quote before any work begins.

| Load Size | Price |
|---|---|
| Single Item (minimum) | $125 |
| 1/4 Load | $140 |
| 1/2 Load | $225 |
| 3/4 Load | $280 |
| Full Load | $325 |
| Full Truck (6 pickup loads) | $545 |

**Surcharges:**
- Hot Tub: starting at $375
- Pool Table: starting at $275
- Piano: starting at $275
- Sleeper Sofa: $125
- Tires: $15–$60 depending on size
- Propane Tank: $10
- Paint: $10/gallon

## Service Areas

Yakima, Union Gap, Selah, West Valley, Terrace Heights, Moxee, Wapato, Sunnyside, Zillah, Grandview, Toppenish, Prosser — all of Central Washington.

## How It Works

1. **Text or call** — Send a photo of what needs to be removed to (509) 314-8132 for a free no-obligation estimate.
2. **Get a quote** — We respond quickly (often within 20 minutes) with an upfront price.
3. **We haul it** — Our uniformed team arrives on time, removes everything, and cleans up after.
4. **Settle up** — Pay by cash, credit card, or check after the job is done.

## Why Choose Junk Bros 509

- Fully licensed and insured (many discount haulers are not)
- Upfront transparent pricing — no surprise fees
- Professional uniformed team
- 5-star rated with 200+ reviews
- Same-day service available
- Responsible disposal — we donate and recycle when possible
- Family owned and operated since 2018

## Customer Reviews

**Victoria Michael (Google):** "I was so pleased with Junk Bros, prompt response and professionalism. They texted to confirm appointment times, text in advance upon arrival, and did a great job removing all items. I would highly recommend this team."

**Kandy Lepe (Nextdoor):** "I called these guys and within twenty minutes they found my couch in the alley and stopped by briefly to get my payment. Easiest, fastest and most professional junk removal service EVER!"

**Shonna Stroud (Google):** "They were friendly, efficient & quick! I'd recommend to anyone. They also cleaned up the dirt & mess off my sidewalk & driveway. Very happy with their service & reasonable price!"

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much does junk removal cost in Yakima?**
A: Junk Bros 509 charges based on volume. Minimum is $125 for a single item. Full truck (6 pickup loads) is $545. All prices include labor, dump fees, and tax with no hidden charges.

**Q: Do you offer same-day junk removal?**
A: Yes. Text a photo to (509) 314-8132 and we can often schedule same-day service across Yakima Valley.

**Q: Are you licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. Junk Bros 509 is fully licensed and insured.

**Q: What areas do you serve?**
A: Yakima, Union Gap, Selah, West Valley, Terrace Heights, Moxee, Wapato, Sunnyside, Zillah, Grandview, Toppenish, and Prosser, WA.

**Q: Do you remove hot tubs?**
A: Yes. Hot tub removal starts at $375 including dismantling, hauling, and disposal.

**Q: How do I get a quote?**
A: Text a photo of what you need removed to (509) 314-8132. We respond quickly with a free no-obligation estimate.
